title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report December 20 2022
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report December 20 2022
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report December 20 2022
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 20/12/2022
DCE iron ore futures rose by 0.19% today, the main contract closed 804.5. The traders' willingness to ship is less.The steel mills are wait and see.The overall trading sentiment of the market is worse. PBF at Shandong port dealt 806-808 yuan/mt; PBF at Tangshan port dealt 818 yuan/ mt,increase 3-4 yuan/mt.
